posts.author: Nithin_phil (Nithin George Philips)
posts.cookedHtml:
My Integration is using a custom trigger and an inbuilt action item

Create an item with mapping

I am using itemMapping as a field type.

monday838×685 30.5 KB

I want an Item Update field as well while mapping, which can be used later for updating the item
Also, is default mapping possible initially, like in this case I want Original Text to be something static and should not be changed by the user.
